title: Totem of Gaga (Dance or Die)
description: Turns the Totem of Undying into Lady Gaga! Comes with a new audio when the totem is activated!
body:
Comes with a new audio when the totem is activated. 

**Ignore incompatible, will work with _all_ versions.**

I couldn't decide between two audios. The second version is located [here](https://modrinth.com/project/totem-of-gaga-v2)
